title: pilosella iserana subsp. schwarzeriana
intro: Pilosella iserana subsp. schwarzeriana, also known as a subspecies of the Pilosella iserana plant, is a rare and lesser-known member of the dandelion family. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used in herbal remedies for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella iserana subsp. schwarzeriana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, although its availability and use may be limited due to its rarity and limited scientific research.
